method.power_proxy: foc_eq24 (VLSFO-equivalent fuel /24h) as brake-power proxy (ISO 19030-2 4.2 / Annex C/D)
method.reference: per-ship clean window: steady days within 45d after a hull-reset event
method.speed_loss_pct: power increase PV / 3 (P proportional to V^3)
method.attribution: thrust-based: hull = thrust-at-speed drift, propeller = power-per-thrust drift

drydock_recommendation.rationale: below critical and slow fouling; keep the underwater-cleaning schedule
